from dsl import *

    x1 = objects(I, T, F, T)
    x2 = sizefilter(x1, ONE)
    x3 = difference(x1, x2)
    x4 = first(x3)
    x5 = color(x4)
    x6 = lbind(position, x4)
    x7 = fork(shoot, center, x6)
